{| class="wikitable"
|+Engishiki Rankings
!Ranking 1
!
!Ranking 2
!
!Ranking 3
!
|-
|Myōjin Taisha
|名神大社
|Kanpei-sha
|官幣社
|Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai and Ainame-sai
|月次相嘗新嘗
|-
|Shikinai Taisha
|式内大社
|Kokuhei-sha
|国幣社
|Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings
|月次新嘗
|-
|Shikinai Shōsha
|式内小社
|
|
|Hoe and Quiver
|鍬靫
|-
|
|
|
|
|Hoe
|鍬
|-
|
|
|
|
|Quiver
|靫
|}
{| class="wikitable"
|+Engishiki Combinations?
|-
| rowspan="3" |Kanpei-sha
|Myōjin Taisha
| rowspan="2" |Kanpei Taisha
|Kanpei Myōjin Taisha?
|-
|Shikinai Taisha
|Kanpei Shikinai Taisha?
|-
|Shikinai Shōsha
| colspan="2" |Kanpei Shosha
|-
| rowspan="3" |Kokuhei-sha
|Myōjin Taisha
| rowspan="2" |Kokuhei Taisha
|Kokuhei Myōjin Taisha?
|-
|Shikinai Taisha
|Kokuhei Shikinai Taisha?
|-
|Shikinai Shōsha
| colspan="2" |Kokuhei Shosha
|}
{| class="wikitable"
|+Modern (Imperial) system
!Category
!Rank
!Kanji
|-
| rowspan="3" |Kanpei-sha
|Kanpei Taisha
|官幣大社
|-
|Kanpei Chusha
|官幣中社
|-
|Kanpei Shosha
|官幣小社
|-
| rowspan="3" |Kokuhei-sha
|Kokuhei Taisha
|国幣大社
|-
|Kokuhei Chusha
|国幣中社
|-
|Kokuhei Shosha
|国幣小社
|-
| rowspan="4" |Min-sha
|Fuken-sha
|府県社
|-
|Gō-sha
|郷社
|-
|Son-sha
|村社
|-
|Hokora
|祠
|}
[[Category:Special:LonelyPages November 4 2025]]

[[en:Engishiki Ranks]]
[[Category:Pages without wikidata]]
